overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in an orange outfit exploring a rain-soaked neon-lit urban plaza at night. The character walks past futuristic storefronts and kiosks, interacts with a vending machine, and navigates through a vibrant cyberpunk commercial district with reflective wet pavement and dense neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with cylindrical kiosk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza past a blue kiosk structure on the left

entered.detail: cylindrical blue structure with illuminated 'OPEN' sign and various stickers
illuminated yellow signage for the pawn shop across the plaza
rain-soaked tiles reflecting red and cyan neon lights
tall buildings with bright neon advertisements and window lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wet reflective pavement of a cyberpunk plaza at night, passing a prominent blue cylindrical kiosk on the left. Neon lights from surrounding buildings cast vivid red and blue reflections across the rain-soaked ground.

events.description: character navigates around red and white glowing cordon tape blocking a crashed emergency vehicle
character turns right to bypass the barrier and continue through the plaza

agents.ego_description: navigating around the cordoned-off area with the white emergency vehicle marked 'Terror Team'

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the barrier tape

entered.detail: white emergency vehicle with red cross markings and 'Terror Team' text on the side
glowing red and white striped caution tape stretched across the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a cordoned-off area featuring a white emergency vehicle with 'Terror Team' markings surrounded by glowing red and white barrier tape. She turns right to navigate around the obstruction as other pedestrians pass by.

events.description: character stops and interacts with a beverage vending machine to purchase an item
character finishes interaction and resumes walking away from the machine

agents.ego_description: approaching and using a vending machine to retrieve an item, then continuing on

notable_agents.action: man in yellow jacket and track pants standing near the vending machine

entered.detail: dark brown vending machine with illuminated product displays and Japanese text
overhead concrete awning providing shelter from the rain

segments.scene_description: Under a protective awning, the character stops at a beverage vending machine adorned with colorful advertisements and glowing displays. After retrieving an item, she continues walking as a man in a yellow jacket stands nearby.

events.description: character approaches the wide stairway leading to an elevated covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking back across the open plaza toward a stairway entrance with neon lighting

notable_agents.action: armed security figure in tactical gear standing near the terror team vehicle

entered.detail: wide concrete stairway with blue neon edges leading upward to an elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the open plaza again, passing the emergency vehicle now on her left where security personnel stand guard. She heads toward a wide stairway leading up to an elevated walkway, with the blue kiosk visible again to her right.

events.description: character begins ascending the stairs toward the upper level
character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs into an elevated covered walkway with blue neon accents

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt descending the stairs

entered.detail: entrance to the elevated covered bridge with curved concrete architecture
overhead architectural elements with bright blue neon strip lighting

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete stairway flanked by blue neon lighting, passing pedestrians coming down. At the top, she enters a covered pedestrian bridge with curved architectural elements and glowing blue accents.

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered neon-lit corridor past various storefronts and vendors

notable_agents.action: heavyset man in leopard print jacket and sunglasses walking toward camera
street vendor at food cart under illuminated umbrella

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian bridge with shops on both sides and overhead wiring
various illuminated storefront signs in pink and blue neon
large glowing advertisement screens mounted on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: Moving through the covered walkway, the character passes beneath glowing blue and pink neon arches. The corridor features various shops, digital advertisements, and pedestrians including a vendor at a food cart and a man in a distinctive leopard-print jacket.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked neon plaza that eventually ascends into a vibrant, covered pedestrian corridor. It begins with the character walking across reflective wet pavement past a blue cylindrical kiosk, where vivid red and blue lights shimmer on the ground. As she navigates around a cordoned-off emergency vehicle marked Terror Team, the scene shifts toward a sheltered awning where she stops at a glowing beverage vending machine. The camera then follows her back across the open plaza and up a wide concrete stairway flanked by blue neon, transitioning from the open night air into a structured architectural space. Finally, the movement flows into a covered bridge characterized by curved blue and pink neon arches, passing digital advertisements and various street vendors within the glowing corridor.
